title: Prove one coordinated workforce change instead of claiming all-in-one
message_angle: Where the competitor asserts an all-in-one platform with thin proof, show a single employee change coordinating HR, payroll, and access end to end.
villain_or_status_quo: all-in-one claims backed only by logos
promised_transformation: from all-in-one slogans to one demonstrated cross-functional workflow
target_jobs: coordinate an employee change across HR, payroll, and IT
why_competitor_cannot_easily_copy: Requires a genuinely unified data model, not additional marketing copy.
why_this_could_backfire: If the competitor publishes a comparable end-to-end demo, the differentiation narrows; comparative claims need legal substantiation.
experiment_hypothesis: A proof-led workflow demo outperforms generic all-in-one copy on qualified demo requests.
minimum_sample_rule: run 2 weeks or 300 sessions per variant
scale_rule: scale if qualified demos beat control by >15% with no guardrail regression
iterate_rule: iterate creative if flat after minimum sample
kill_rule: kill if legal substantiation fails or guardrail regresses
